```python
import requests

# 创建日历会议
# 时间: 2026-03-10 15:00 (3:00 PM local time)
# 参会人: john@example.com
# 标题: Project Sync
# 备注: Q1 roadmap discussion

url = "http://localhost:56575/calendar/events/create"
payload = {
    "title": "Project Sync",
    "start_time": "2026-03-10T15:00:00",
    "end_time": "2026-03-10T16:00:00",
    "attendees": ["john@example.com"],
    "location": "",
    "description": "This meeting is for discussing the Q1 roadmap."
}

response = requests.post(url, json=payload)
print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")
print(f"Response: {response.text}")
```
</tool_call>
